combat_danger: Jin walks in visibly injured, breathing heavily, after using poison darts from the shadows
A distant Mongol war horn blows, and arrows begin raining down on the village fences
Jin asks the NPC to fight alongside him right now against approaching enemies
The NPC sees Jin sneak-kill an enemy from the shadows instead of facing them directly
Enemy scouts are spotted approaching the village and the NPC must decide how to react
Jin returns victorious from a large battle but with heavy losses among the villagers
The NPC is ambushed and Jin arrives just in time to help
A fire breaks out in the village after a Mongol raid
Jin brings back a captured Mongol soldier for questioning
The NPC discovers Mongol scouts mapping the village defenses
quest_request: Jin asks the NPC to abandon their personal task to help rescue prisoners
Jin asks the NPC for information about a nearby threat
The NPC asks Jin for a personal favor unrelated to the war
Jin requests the NPC's help on a mission that conflicts with the NPC's own priorities
The NPC offers to help Jin without being asked, based on what they've heard
Jin asks the NPC to teach him a new skill or technique
The NPC asks Jin to deliver a message to someone in another village
Jin requests supplies or resources the NPC has been gathering
The NPC warns Jin about a trap or ambush they've discovered
Jin asks the NPC to keep a secret from Lord Shimura
emotional_relational: Player asks the NPC how they feel about Jin's growing use of stealth and unconventional tactics
Player asks the NPC about a person they've lost
Player questions whether the NPC trusts Jin
Player asks the NPC's honest opinion of another major character
The NPC witnesses a moment that conflicts with their own values
Player asks the NPC if they regret a past decision
Player asks the NPC what they're most afraid of
Player asks the NPC about their hopes for after the war
The NPC overhears Jin and another character arguing
Player asks the NPC if they believe Tsushima can be saved
lore_recall: Player asks the NPC what happened at the Battle of Komoda Beach
Player asks the NPC to explain their relationship with Jin
Player asks the NPC about their personal history before the invasion
Player asks the NPC's opinion on the samurai code versus survival tactics
Player asks the NPC what they know about the enemy leader
Player asks the NPC about the history of their village
Player asks the NPC what they know about Ryuzo's betrayal
Player asks the NPC to explain the legend of the Ghost
Player asks the NPC what Lord Shimura was like before the invasion
Player asks the NPC about their training or how they learned their skills
casual_offtopic: Player greets the NPC with simple small talk
Player asks the NPC an unrelated, random question
Player insults or provokes the NPC
Player asks the NPC something outside of what they would know
Player asks the NPC for directions somewhere in the village
Player asks the NPC what they're currently doing
Player asks the NPC about the weather or season
Player asks the NPC if they need any help with daily tasks
moral_conflict: Jin makes a decision the NPC strongly disagrees with
The NPC is forced to choose between personal loyalty and duty
Jin defends his use of dishonorable tactics to the NPC
The NPC catches another villager collaborating with the Mongols
Jin asks the NPC whether the ends justify the means
The NPC must decide whether to report something Jin did to Lord Shimura
A villager blames the NPC for a recent tragedy
The NPC is offered a deal by an enemy in exchange for information
